Title: Info
Text:
The "On Mouse Up" event is generated by Picture objects.

This new event is applicable for non-draggable objects.

When you receive the "On Mouse Up" event, you can get the coordinate using "MouseX" and "MouseY".

Title: Advanced example
Text: Click on the 4D Summit logo and move it to another place.

Title: Simple example
Text: Click on picture zone and draw a SVG rectangle.
